metadata.synopsis: In this cult-classic shocker, a certifiably deranged maniac creates a shocking device that shrinks people to foot-high figurines.
metadata.title: Attack Of The Puppet People

image.alternateText: X: The Man With The X-Ray Eyes

modalImage.alternateText: X: The Man With The X-Ray Eyes

metadata.synopsis: In this cult-classic, a driven scientist discovers that his x-ray vision formula brings with it incredible powers…and incredible temptations.
metadata.title: X: The Man With The X-Ray Eyes

metadata.synopsis: "A Bucket of Blood," directed by Roger Corman, is the best of the genre hyphenates, a black-comedy-beatnik-culture-horror film. Dick Miller stars.
metadata.title: A Bucket Of Blood

metadata.synopsis: To restore the life of his fiancee, who was decapitated in an automobile accident, a brilliant surgeon tries to find a suitable body to attach to her head, which he keeps alive and locked in a dungeon. But nothing will stop her from getting revenge!
metadata.title: The Brain That Wouldn't Die

metadata.synopsis: Half Man, Half Bat, All Terror! After being attacked by a bat, Dr. John Beck mutates into a blood-sucking monster, embarking on a killing spree...and he won't stop until he has the one thing his new existence is missing ... his beautiful wife!
metadata.title: The Bat People
